original_text:
### Hierarchy & Application
- Apply the palette in the **primary > secondary > tertiary ratio** shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.
- **Headlines/headings:** Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
- **Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds (with increased line height, §1.2).
- **Charts/about:blank** Brand Blue + Sky Blue dominant; **Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures**; gray for placebo.
- **Callout surfaces:** Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).
- **Coral:** sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. **[GENERAL]:** avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.
- **Links [GENERAL]:** Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.
- The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).

quotes: Apply the palette in the **primary > secondary > tertiary ratio** shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.

rules.intent: Preserve the overall visual brand weight where blues and golds dictate the canvas hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: Apply the palette in the primary > secondary > tertiary ratio: blues and golds must dominate, while tertiary colors act strictly as accents and surfaces.

quotes: Headlines/headings: Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
Body text: Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds
**Headlines/headings:** Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
**Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds (with increased line height, §1.2).

rules.intent: Maintain legible typographic color contrast across variable backgrounds.
rules.rule_text: Headlines use Brand Blue (headline.color = #00529b) on light, and White (#ffffff) on dark backgrounds. Body text uses Graphite (body.color = #212121) on light, and White (#ffffff) on dark backgrounds.

quotes: Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures
**Charts/about:blank** Brand Blue + Sky Blue dominant; **Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures**; gray for placebo.

rules.intent: Ensure infographic elements are visually intuitive and reserve high-contrast gold highlights for critical numbers only.
rules.rule_text: Charts must use Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) as dominant values. Gray is used for placebo, and Sunshine/Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) is strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures.

quotes: Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).
**Callout surfaces:** Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).

rules.intent: Establish semantic color codes for data callouts vs editorial blocks.
rules.rule_text: Callout background surfaces must match their functional type: use Light Blue at 70% tint (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) for data callouts, and Golden Sand at 30% tint (opacity.callout.golden_sand_box = 0.3) for text-heavy callout boxes.

quotes: never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. [GENERAL]: avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.
**Coral:** sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. **[GENERAL]:** avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.

rules.intent: Keep high-energy Coral restricted to minor accents to prevent visual noise.
rules.rule_text: Coral (color.tertiary.coral = #F26A38) must not be used for primary CTAs, headlines, or data representations. Avoid Coral entirely in email sections unless explicitly required by the creative brief.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.
**Links [GENERAL]:** Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.

rules.intent: Ensure link visibility and consistent accessibility behaviors across standard reading surfaces.
rules.rule_text: Inline hyperlinks must be underlined (body.link.text_decoration = 'underline') and styled in Brand Blue (body.link.color = #00529b) on light backgrounds, or White (#ffffff) on dark backgrounds.

quotes: 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances
The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).

rules.intent: Preserve the integrity of the trademark logo mark across all assets.
rules.rule_text: The logo icon's 70% transparency (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) of Pantone 7548 C (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) must be maintained in all instances, including when used as a pattern or a background graphic.
